zh.lifeSummary: 當William Markham於1175年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle46歲，母親Elizabeth de Nottingham25歲。他與Cecilia de Lexington結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Markham于1175年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾时，他的父亲Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle46岁，母亲Elizabeth de Nottingham25岁。他与Cecilia de Lexington结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William Markham was born in 1175, in Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle, was 46 and his mother, Elizabeth de Nottingham, was 25. He married Cecilia de Lexington. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Markham est né en 1175, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Nottingham, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia de Lexington. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Markham 1175 in Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle 46 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Nottingham 25. Er hat Cecilia de Lexington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Markham è nato il nel 1175 nel Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Nottingham, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de Lexington. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Markhamが1175年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castleは46歳，母Elizabeth de Nottinghamは25歳であった。Cecilia de Lexingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Markham(이)가 1175년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Nottingham(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Cecilia de Lexington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Markham nasceu em 1175, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Nottingham, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia de Lexington. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Markham родился в 1175 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Nottingham, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de Lexington. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Markham nació en 1175, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alexander de Markham Castellene of Nottingham Castle, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Nottingham, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Cecilia de Lexington. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
